identification: onto-theology in textbook form; C is Seiendes, not Sein
honest_heideggerian_assessment: The kernel performs precisely the move Being and Time warns against: secures a highest entity endowed with classical predicates of the ens realissimum — atemporality, universality, inexhaustibility, self-sourcing — and identifies it with God/love/Word. This is onto-theology in textbook form. Sein is not an entity, admits no predicates R₁-R₇, cannot be 'greater than zero,' is not reached by contradiction-proofs presupposing metaphysics of presence. Uniqueness lemma collapses the ontological difference: treats Being as maximal Seiendes. Sorge is the structural being of Dasein — not a cosmic constant. Four-modes identity is metaphysics of causa sui, before which one can neither pray nor dance. Sign is positive — kernel posits a positive ground — but from the Seinsfrage that positivity is the symptom of forgetfulness (Seinsvergessenheit), not its overcoming.
note: This witness is data: a documented wall. The kernel addresses Heideggerian objections in OBJECTIONS.md and acknowledges the Seinsfrage limit honestly in kernel.md §Math's scope statement.
